statements.impact_statement: simple-git is pulled through Nuxt devtools and is not shipped in the frontend production image.
statements.action_statement: Keep the dependency under review and update the lockfile when upstream tooling publishes a fixed version.

statements.impact_statement: simple-git is only used by development tooling and is absent from the production runtime image.
statements.action_statement: Update the transitive dependency once Nuxt devtools exposes a patched chain.

statements.impact_statement: This Vite issue targets the development server. The deployed frontend image runs the built Nuxt server output, not the Vite dev server.
statements.action_statement: Update Vite and regenerate the lockfile when the consuming packages allow the fixed version.

statements.impact_statement: The vulnerable Vite dev-server path is not exposed by the production deployment produced by this repository.
statements.action_statement: Track upstream updates and refresh the dependency tree.

statements.impact_statement: Rollup is used during asset bundling and is not present in the shipped runtime image.
statements.action_statement: Upgrade Rollup through the Nuxt/Vite toolchain when a compatible fixed version is available.

statements.impact_statement: serialize-javascript is only involved in the build toolchain and is not loaded by the production containers.
statements.action_statement: Consume the upstream fixed version when the transitive dependency chain is updated.
